alternative_config_policy.pass_rule: projected later internal support must remain inside the N15 generated target band, above the N13 support floor, within the N13 bounded response budget, and backed by N09 recovery plus N15 replay cleanliness

checks.detail: 6-B uses target-band gating from N15/N13/N09 rather than changing 6-A thresholds
resource/support and shared-medium loops remain closed
all unsafe claim flags remain false
6-B supports alternative bounded G5 only; final closeout remains pending

comparison_to_iteration_6a.i6b_difference: 6-B does not change the 6-A breach/flux thresholds. It uses an independent target-band support-buffer policy from N15, with N13 response budget and N09 recovery context.
